requirement_topic.en: Formaldehyde Emissions from Composite Wood Products (EPA TSCA Title VI / CARB ATCM Phase 2)
requirement_topic.zh: 复合木制品甲醛排放（EPA TSCA第六章 / CARB ATCM Phase 2）
requirement_topic.zht: 複合木製品甲醛排放（EPA TSCA第六章 / CARB ATCM Phase 2）

summary.en: Under EPA TSCA Title VI (40 CFR Part 770, effective January 1, 2019 for most panels), composite wood products — hardwood plywood (HWPW), medium-density fiberboard (MDF), thin MDF, and particleboard — sold or supplied in the United States, or used to make finished goods sold in the United States, must meet formaldehyde emission limits. Emission limits (ppm CARB Phase 2 / TSCA Title VI): HWPW 0.05 ppm, MDF 0.11 ppm, thin MDF 0.13 ppm, particleboard 0.09 ppm. Products must be certified by an EPA-recognized Third Party Certifier (TPC). Finished goods manufacturers must either use TSCA-certified composite wood panels or be certified themselves. Labelling must show 'TSCA Title VI compliant' or 'CARB Phase 2 compliant' on the product or accompanying documentation. CARB ATCM 17 CCR Section 93120 (Phase 2) preceded and is substantially aligned with TSCA Title VI; CARB Phase 2 labelling satisfies TSCA Title VI labelling in California and nationally.
summary.zh: 依据EPA TSCA第六章（40 CFR第770部分，多数板材自2019年1月1日起生效），在美国销售或供应的复合木制品——硬木胶合板（HWPW）、中密度纤维板（MDF）、薄MDF及刨花板——或用于制造在美国销售的成品的上述材料，须符合甲醛排放限值。排放限值（CARB Phase 2 / TSCA第六章，ppm）：硬木胶合板0.05、MDF 0.11、薄MDF 0.13、刨花板0.09。产品须经EPA认可的第三方认证机构（TPC）认证。成品制造商须使用经TSCA认证的复合木板材，或自身获得认证。产品或随附文件须标注"TSCA Title VI compliant"或"CARB Phase 2 compliant"。CARB ATCM（加州法规第17节第93120条，Phase 2）早于TSCA第六章颁布且与其基本一致；CARB Phase 2标注在加州及全国范围内均满足TSCA第六章标注要求。
summary.zht: 依據EPA TSCA第六章（40 CFR第770部分，多數板材自2019年1月1日起生效），在美國銷售或供應的複合木製品——硬木膠合板（HWPW）、中密度纖維板（MDF）、薄MDF及刨花板——或用於製造在美國銷售的成品的上述材料，須符合甲醛排放限值。排放限值（CARB Phase 2 / TSCA第六章，ppm）：硬木膠合板0.05、MDF 0.11、薄MDF 0.13、刨花板0.09。產品須經EPA認可的第三方認證機構（TPC）認證。成品製造商須使用經TSCA認證的複合木板材，或自身獲得認證。產品或隨附文件須標注「TSCA Title VI compliant」或「CARB Phase 2 compliant」。CARB ATCM（加州法規第17節第93120條，Phase 2）早於TSCA第六章頒佈且與其基本一致；CARB Phase 2標注在加州及全國範圍內均滿足TSCA第六章標注要求。

standards_or_laws: EPA TSCA Title VI — 40 CFR Part 770 (Formaldehyde Standards for Composite Wood Products)
CARB ATCM — 17 CCR Section 93120 (Airborne Toxic Control Measure for Composite Wood Products, Phase 2)

summary.en: China regulates formaldehyde in furniture and composite wood through GB 18584-2001 (Limits of formaldehyde and other harmful substances in wood furniture for indoor use), which is a mandatory standard under the GB framework administered by SAMR/SAC. GB 18584 sets a formaldehyde limit of 1.5 mg/L (large chamber test, E1 class). Composite wood panels used in furniture must also meet GB/T 17657-2013 panel standards (E1 class: ≤9 mg/100g for perforator method or ≤1.5 mg/L for chamber method). China's GB limits are significantly less stringent than TSCA Title VI / CARB Phase 2 limits. Chinese test reports (CMA-accredited labs) to GB 18584 are not accepted as evidence of TSCA Title VI compliance; separate TPC certification is mandatory for US market entry.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准GB 18584-2001（室内装饰装修材料 木家具中有害物质限量）对家具及复合木制品中的甲醛进行监管，由市场监管总局/国家标准化管理委员会执行。GB 18584规定甲醛限量为1.5 mg/L（大气候箱法，E1级）。用于家具的复合木板材还须符合GB/T 17657-2013板材标准（E1级：穿孔萃取法≤9 mg/100g，或气候箱法≤1.5 mg/L）。中国GB标准限值显著宽松于TSCA第六章/CARB Phase 2限值。依据GB 18584取得的CMA认可实验室检测报告不被接受作为TSCA第六章合规证明；进入美国市场须单独进行TPC认证。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準GB 18584-2001（室內裝飾裝修材料 木家具中有害物質限量）對家具及複合木製品中的甲醛進行監管，由市場監管總局/國家標準化管理委員會執行。GB 18584規定甲醛限量為1.5 mg/L（大氣候箱法，E1級）。用於家具的複合木板材還須符合GB/T 17657-2013板材標準（E1級：穿孔萃取法≤9 mg/100g，或氣候箱法≤1.5 mg/L）。中國GB標準限值顯著寬鬆於TSCA第六章/CARB Phase 2限值。依據GB 18584取得的CMA認可實驗室檢測報告不被接受作為TSCA第六章合規證明；進入美國市場須單獨進行TPC認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 18584-2001 — Limits of formaldehyde and other harmful substances in wood furniture for indoor use (mandatory, SAMR/SAC)
GB/T 17657-2013 — Test methods of evaluating the properties of wood-based panels and surface decorated wood-based panels (E1 class composite panel limits)

gap.en: This is the single largest compliance gap for Chinese furniture exports to the US. Key differences: (1) Emission limits are tighter under TSCA Title VI / CARB Phase 2 than GB 18584 (e.g., MDF: 0.11 ppm vs. 1.5 mg/L — different test method but structurally more stringent); (2) Third-Party Certifier (TPC) certification by an EPA-recognized body is mandatory — Chinese CMA lab reports are not accepted; (3) All composite wood panels in the finished product must be TPC-certified, including panels sourced from sub-suppliers; (4) Labelling on the product or shipping documentation must state TSCA Title VI or CARB Phase 2 compliance; (5) Importers bear responsibility if products are non-compliant at US Customs. Penalties include stop-sale orders and fines. Finished goods using no-added-formaldehyde (NAF) or ultra-low-emitting formaldehyde (ULEF) resins may qualify for alternative certification pathways.
gap.zh: 这是中国家具出口美国最重大的合规差距。主要差异：（1）TSCA第六章/CARB Phase 2排放限值严于GB 18584（如MDF：0.11 ppm对比1.5 mg/L——测试方法不同但结构上更严格）；（2）须由EPA认可的第三方认证机构（TPC）进行认证，中国CMA实验室报告不被接受；（3）成品中所有复合木板材须经TPC认证，包括来自分供应商的板材；（4）产品或运输文件须标注TSCA第六章或CARB Phase 2合规声明；（5）产品在美国海关不合规时，进口商须承担责任，后果包括停售令及罚款。使用无添加甲醛（NAF）或超低排放甲醛（ULEF）树脂的成品可能符合替代认证途径的条件。
gap.zht: 這是中國家具出口美國最重大的合規差距。主要差異：（1）TSCA第六章/CARB Phase 2排放限值嚴於GB 18584（如MDF：0.11 ppm對比1.5 mg/L——測試方法不同但結構上更嚴格）；（2）須由EPA認可的第三方認證機構（TPC）進行認證，中國CMA實驗室報告不被接受；（3）成品中所有複合木板材須經TPC認證，包括來自分供應商的板材；（4）產品或運輸文件須標注TSCA第六章或CARB Phase 2合規聲明；（5）產品在美國海關不合規時，進口商須承擔責任，後果包括停售令及罰款。使用無添加甲醛（NAF）或超低排放甲醛（ULEF）樹脂的成品可能符合替代認證途徑的條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — TSCA Title VI (40 CFR Part 770) is federal law, enforceable by EPA; CARB Phase 2 is California state law, substantially aligned. Applies to composite wood panels and finished goods sold or imported into the United States.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18584-2001 is a mandatory GB standard enforced by SAMR. E1-class panel limits under GB/T 17657-2013 apply to composite panels used in furniture.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TSCA Title VI (40 CFR Part 770) mandates EPA-recognized Third Party Certifier (TPC) certification for composite wood panels used in furniture sold in the US. Chinese GB 18584 compliance and CMA lab reports do not satisfy this requirement. Exporters must source TPC-certified panels and include TSCA Title VI or CARB Phase 2 compliant labelling on products or documentation. This is the highest-priority compliance item for composite-wood furniture entering the US market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】TSCA第六章（40 CFR第770部分）要求在美国销售的家具所用复合木板材须经EPA认可的第三方认证机构（TPC）认证。中国GB 18584合规及CMA实验室报告不满足上述要求。出口商须采购经TPC认证的板材，并在产品或文件上标注TSCA第六章或CARB Phase 2合规声明。这是复合木家具进入美国市场的最优先合规事项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】TSCA第六章（40 CFR第770部分）要求在美國銷售的家具所用複合木板材須經EPA認可的第三方認證機構（TPC）認證。中國GB 18584合規及CMA實驗室報告不滿足上述要求。出口商須採購經TPC認證的板材，並在產品或文件上標注TSCA第六章或CARB Phase 2合規聲明。這是複合木家具進入美國市場的最優先合規事項。
